channel.title: Quality on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Quality on Pi Stack

item.title: LanguageTool vs Vale vs textlint: Self-Hosted Grammar and Style Checking Guide 2026
item.description: Writing clear, error-free documentation at scale is one of the hardest problems for engineering teams. Relying on cloud-based grammar checkers like Grammarly means sending your internal documents — API specs, runbooks, architecture decision records — through third-party servers. For teams with compliance requirements or privacy concerns, self-hosted grammar and style checking is not optional.
